news.title:
Biocon launched Bosaya and Aukelso denosumab biosimilars in the US.
FDA granted interchangeable status by Sept 2025; US market valued at $5B in 2024.
news.summary:
Biocon launched Bosaya and Aukelso denosumab biosimilars in the US.
FDA granted interchangeable status by Sept 2025; US market valued at $5B in 2024.

news.title:
Biocon shares fell 4% to ₹340.8, with 9.58 mn shares traded on NSE amid block deals.
Biocon aims to lead in insulin and GLP-1 therapies, focusing on affordability and global expansion.
news.summary:
Biocon shares fell 4% to ₹340.8, with 9.58 mn shares traded on NSE amid block deals.
Biocon aims to lead in insulin and GLP-1 therapies, focusing on affordability and global expansion.

news.title:
Biocon Ltd. executed an NSE block trade of 1,374,453 shares at Rs. 349.
The total transaction value for the block trade was approximately Rs. 47.97 crores.
news.summary:
Biocon Ltd. executed an NSE block trade of 1,374,453 shares at Rs. 349.
The total transaction value for the block trade was approximately Rs. 47.97 crores.

news.title:
Biocon aims to become a global leader in insulin production, per chairperson Shaw.
Company shifts focus as rivals explore newer therapies like GLP-1 drugs.
news.summary:
Biocon aims to become a global leader in insulin production, per chairperson Shaw.
Company shifts focus as rivals explore newer therapies like GLP-1 drugs.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.
Biocon, BSE, DAM Capital, and Titagarh Rail receive buy or hold advice with key price levels highlighted for potential gains.
news.summary:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.

news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.

news.title: Biocon anticipates double-digit growth driven by biosimilars and US launches.
news.summary: Biocon anticipates double-digit growth driven by biosimilars and US launches.

news.title:
Biocon MD Siddharth Mittal resigns, effective March 31, transitioning within the group; Shreehas Tambe named successor.
Biocon stock fell 3% post-announcement, recovering slightly; leadership changes aim to drive operational efficiency and global growth.
news.summary:
Biocon MD Siddharth Mittal resigns, effective March 31, transitioning within the group; Shreehas Tambe named successor.
Biocon stock fell 3% post-announcement, recovering slightly; leadership changes aim to drive operational efficiency and global growth.

news.title:
Biocon to appoint Shreehas Tambe as CEO & MD from April 1, 2026.
CFO to change to Kedar Upadhye; senior management roles updated for restructuring.
news.summary:
Biocon to appoint Shreehas Tambe as CEO & MD from April 1, 2026.
CFO to change to Kedar Upadhye; senior management roles updated for restructuring.

news.title:
Biocon's board accepted Mukesh Kamath's resignation as Interim CFO, effective 31 Mar 2026.
Kedar Upadhye, CFO of Biocon Biologics, appointed as Biocon's CFO from 1 Apr 2026.
news.summary:
Biocon's board accepted Mukesh Kamath's resignation as Interim CFO, effective 31 Mar 2026.
Kedar Upadhye, CFO of Biocon Biologics, appointed as Biocon's CFO from 1 Apr 2026.

news.title:
Biocon poised to benefit as Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk exit European insulin market, creating significant growth opportunities.
Biocon's stock rose 3.2% to Rs 381; its biosimilar insulin portfolio and approvals give it a competitive edge domestically and globally.
news.summary:
Biocon poised to benefit as Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk exit European insulin market, creating significant growth opportunities.
Biocon's stock rose 3.2% to Rs 381; its biosimilar insulin portfolio and approvals give it a competitive edge domestically and globally.

news.title:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.
news.summary:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.

news.title:
Biocon receives USFDA approval, boosting its prospects in the pharmaceutical sector.
Balaji Amines faces challenges due to LNG crunch; Max Financial also mentioned.
news.summary:

news.title:
Biocon's arm gains FDA approval for Liraglutide (Gvictoza) to treat type 2 diabetes.
The approval strengthens Biocon's portfolio of complex drug offerings.
news.summary:

news.title:
Biocon Pharma gains USFDA approval for Liraglutide injection, boosting its complex drug portfolio.
Stock up 9.2% YoY in Q3FY26; Nuvama targets Rs 480 price, implying 27% upside amid strong US market growth.
news.summary:
Biocon Pharma gains USFDA approval for Liraglutide injection, boosting its complex drug portfolio.
Stock up 9.2% YoY in Q3FY26; Nuvama targets Rs 480 price, implying 27% upside amid strong US market growth.

news.title:
FDA eases regulatory rules for Biocon, boosting cheaper biologic drug production.
This move aims to improve access to affordable medications significantly.
news.summary:
FDA eases regulatory rules for Biocon, boosting cheaper biologic drug production.

news.title:
Biocon Ltd acquired OCRPS of Biocon Biosphere Ltd and Biocon Pharma Ltd.
Acquisition supports subsidiaries' working capital, capex, and corporate needs; total cost Rs. 315.3 Cr.
news.summary:

Focus on Biocon-Biocon Biologics integration, product portfolio, manufacturing, and global presence highlighted.
